title: iresine polymorpha var. verticillata
intro: Iresine polymorpha var. verticillata, also known as the 'Purple Fountain Plant', is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections and wounds. The herbal preparations of Iresine polymorpha var. verticillata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
